data.title: Majority of college students use AI for classwork, but universities lack AI courses, leaving students unprepared for future careers - Honorlock study.
data.description: A recent study by Honorlock in Boca Raton, Florida revealed a significant deficiency in college students' readiness for AI-driven careers, highlighting a pressing need for enhanced preparation. The research brings attention to the growing importance of equipping students with skills tailored for the evolving job market, where artificial intelligence plays a prominent role. This finding underscores the necessity for educational institutions to adapt their curricula to better align with industry demands, ensuring graduates are adequately equipped for the modern workforce.

data.title: Global smartphone market grew 2% in 2025 to 1.25 billion units. Memory headwinds expected in 2026.
data.description: According to recent research by Omdia, global smartphone shipments experienced a 2% increase in 2025, reaching a total of 1.25 billion units. This represents the highest annual level since 2021. All regions saw growth compared to the previous year, except for Greater China, which saw a slight decline due to the waning impact of a national subsidy program that had initially boosted its performance in early 2025. The market was primarily driven by strong demand from both upgraders and replacement buyers, leading to record-breaking sales for several vendors.

data.title: New global student social network wants to connect universities and empower students, using real student voices.
data.description: A recently launched international student social network aims to revolutionize the university selection process by prioritizing authentic student opinions over rankings and marketing propaganda. data.title: Endeavor Bancorp's net income for Q4 2025 was $1.7 million, showcasing NIM expansion, down from $1.73M in Q3 and up from $1.08M in Q4 2024.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in San Diego, Endeavor Bancorp, trading as OTCQX: EDVR, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company, which owns Endeavor Bank, reported a net income of $1.70 million, translating to $0.45 per diluted share. This figure shows a slight decline from the third quarter of 2025, where net income was $1.73 million or $0.46 per diluted share. When compared to the fourth quarter of 2024, where net income was $1.08 million, or $0.29 per diluted share, there is noticeable growth. It's important to note that all financial results provided are unaudited.

data.title: Leggett & Platt to release 4Q & full year earnings on Feb 11, 2026, with a call on Feb 12 at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Carthage, Missouri, January 29, 2026 - Leggett & Platt (NYSE:LEG), a manufacturer of engineered products for various markets, will announce its fourth quarter and full-year earnings on February 11, 2026, post-market close.
